parameters.name: vref
parameters.override_behavior: sets positive and negative full-scale output magnitudes

parameters.name: vtrans
parameters.override_behavior: sets the logic threshold for all four voltage-coded input bits

modeling_constraints: Decode the four voltage-coded bits continuously in the declared MSB-to-LSB order.
Drive the affine bipolar transfer with a smoothed voltage contribution.
Do not use current contributions, ddt(), idt(), file I/O, validation hooks, or simulator-specific side channels.

properties.observable_contract: Each input is decoded continuously as one only when its voltage exceeds vtrans, with vd3 as MSB and vd0 as LSB.
Unsigned code 0 produces approximately negative vref.
Unsigned code 15 produces approximately positive vref.
Every one-code increase raises the output target by the same voltage increment across codes 0 through 15.
The output is strictly monotonic with increasing unsigned code for vref greater than zero.
The DAC target responds to input-code threshold changes without requiring a clock event, using tdel, trise, and tfall for output timing.

title: Bipolar DAC 4b Continuous
